text:
On Wed, 24 Jul 1996, Zach Heilig wrote:

> >How-To-Repeat:
> 
> $ route add default -link tun0
> 
> (is there a way to specify default traffic goes out tun0?)

Maybe 

route add default tun0_interface_ip
